_note: Engineered image-gen prompts for every room/cyberspace bg id referenced in data/rooms/*.json and data/cyberspace/databases.json. Locked art direction: heavily rotoscoped painted-over-live-action, graphic novel realism, flattened color planes, visible ink contours, sun-faded retro 35mm film palette, symmetrical deadpan framing, mid-century sci-fi production design, warm film grain, theatrical stillness. Use existing room prose as visual reference, not literal text. NO text/signage; no gore; environment-only plates; clear navigable interiors. Target render size: 1344x768 or 16:9 equivalent.
style_prefix: heavily rotoscoped painted-over-live-action, graphic novel realism, flattened color planes, visible ink contour lines, slightly unstable rotoscope edges, hand-painted surfaces, realistic perspective and lighting underneath, sun-faded retro 35mm film palette, symmetrical deadpan framing, mid-century sci-fi production design, warm film grain, theatrical stillness, modern cyberpunk noir, hot violet/magenta neon accent lighting, no people, unoccupied environment,
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, signage, gibberish writing, subtitles, readable words, letters, posters with text, storefront signs, neon signs with letters, menus, UI text, signatures, artist mark, people, characters, human figures, faces, extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated anatomy, gore, viscera, blood, human heart, exposed organs, corpse, blurry, low quality, photoreal CGI, glossy 3D render, CGI smoothness, plastic render, anime, cel shading, pixel art, out of frame, cropped, worst quality
cyber_style_prefix: modern cyberspace interpreted in heavily rotoscoped graphic-novel style: infinite black void gridded with glowing neon wireframe lines, luminous data architecture, cinematic perspective with hand-painted inked surfaces, flattened glow planes, warm film grain, electric magenta and violet, no text/logos, 16:9 game plate,
cyber_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, gibberish writing, readable words, letters, people, faces, blurry, low quality, photoreal CGI, glossy 3D render, flat colors, muddy
